title: Schema exercises (scope + visibility_mode) + exercise_acl + exercise_media
objective: Adicionar campos scope, visibility_mode, created_by_user_id à tabela exercises e criar tabelas exercise_acl e exercise_media com constraints conforme invariantes EXB.
forbidden: outras tabelas além de exercises, exercise_acl, exercise_media

tasks.title: Migration exercise_schema_scope_acl_media: adicionar campos scope/visibility + criar tabelas ACL/media
tasks.reason: Materializar schema de escopo SYSTEM/ORG, visibilidade e ACL conforme INV-TRAIN-047/EXB-ACL-001/006.

validation.command: cd "Hb Track - Backend" && alembic upgrade head && python -c "from app.db import engine; import pandas as pd; q_scope = pd.read_sql('SELECT constraint_name FROM information_schema.check_constraints WHERE constraint_name = \'ck_exercises_scope\'', engine); q_vis = pd.read_sql('SELECT constraint_name FROM information_schema.check_constraints WHERE constraint_name = \'ck_exercises_visibility_mode\'', engine); q_acl = pd.read_sql('SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = \'exercise_acl\'', engine); q_media = pd.read_sql('SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = \'exercise_media\'', engine); assert len(q_scope) == 1, 'ck_exercises_scope missing'; assert len(q_vis) == 1, 'ck_exercises_visibility_mode missing'; assert len(q_acl) == 1, 'exercise_acl table missing'; assert len(q_media) == 1, 'exercise_media table missing'; print('PASS: schema constraints OK')"
validation.rationale: Valida que migration criou constraints e tabelas conforme INV-TRAIN-047/EXB-ACL-001/006/052.

acceptance_criteria.rule: Migration cria exercises.scope (enum SYSTEM|ORG), exercises.visibility_mode (enum org_wide|restricted, default restricted), exercises.created_by_user_id (FK users).
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Campos existem com constraints e defaults corretos em information_schema.columns.

acceptance_criteria.rule: Tabela exercise_acl existe com (exercise_id FK, user_id FK) e constraint unique uq_exercise_acl_exercise_user.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Tabela existe e constraint unique evidenciada em information_schema.table_constraints.

acceptance_criteria.rule: Tabela exercise_media existe com (exercise_id FK, media_type, reference) e constraints de validação ck_exercise_media_type e ck_exercise_media_reference_not_empty.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Tabela existe com constraints CHECK evidenciadas.

risks.description: Alembic head divergente ou migration anterior falhando
risks.mitigation: Executor deve rodar alembic current antes da migration e resolver conflitos.

risks.description: Dados pré-existentes na tabela exercises sem scope/visibility
risks.mitigation: Migration deve preencher scope=SYSTEM por default em exercises existentes (backfill safe).

evidence_expected.validation_output: PASS: schema constraints OK + alembic upgrade head exit 0
evidence_expected.notes: Migration deve ser reversível (downgrade testado). Executor deve regenerar SSOT após migration.

rollback_plan: git restore dos 4 models (exercise.py, exercise_acl.py, exercise_media.py, e se necessário exercise_favorite.py)
